---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: about-hero
# Philippe Remusat

### Principal Statistical Programmer · Study Lead

📍 Lausanne/Basel Area, Switzerland
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Summary

Senior Statistical Programmer with 20+ years of expertise in clinical development. Proven track record as a Global Study Lead in Oncology (Phases I–III), delivering successful submission packages for **FDA, EMA, and PMDA**.

Currently bridging legacy SAS environments with modern Open Source — **R/Pharmaverse** and AI-driven automation — at Debiopharm.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Experience

| Period      | Company                   | Role                                 |
|-------------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| 2025 – 2026 | **Debiopharm** · Lausanne | Senior Statistical Programmer (Lead) |
| 2018 – 2024 | **Roche** · Basel         | Global Study Lead                    |
| 2017        | **Cytel** · Geneva        | Senior Statistical Programmer (Lead) |
| 2014 – 2017 | **IQVIA** · UK/Remote     | Lead Statistical Programmer          |
| 2008 – 2014 | **Clinbay** · France      | Senior Statistical Programmer (Lead) |
| 2006 – 2008 | **Novartis** · Basel      | Statistical Programmer               |
| 2003 – 2005 | **Eli Lilly** · Belgium   | Statistical Analyst                  |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Core Skills

:::::: skills-grid
::: skill-block
### Clinical & Regulatory

-   CDISC (SDTM & ADaM)
-   FDA · EMA · PMDA submissions
-   Pinnacle 21 · Define.xml
-   SDRG / ADRG
-   MedDRA · WHODrug
:::

::: skill-block
### Technical Stack

-   R · tidyverse · admiral
-   Pharmaverse · Teal
-   R Shiny
-   SAS (Advanced Macro)
-   Git / GitLab · SQL
:::

::: skill-block
### Therapeutic Areas

-   Oncology (Phase I–III)
-   Multiple Sclerosis
-   Epilepsy · Ophthalmology
-   Diabetes · PK studies
:::
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

-   **MSc Econometrics & Statistics** — University of Toulouse, France (2002)
-   **BSc Mathematics** — University of Nice Sophia-Antipolis, France (2001)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Publications

-   *Comparison of two methods for Surgical Implantation of Radio-Telemetry Devices* — Royal Society of Medicine Press
-   *Automation of clinical trial: Graphical approach* — Phuse Conference, Budapest

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contact

-   💼 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/philippe-remusat-739b902/)
-   📧 remusatp\@yahoo.fr
-   🐙 [GitHub](https://github.com/FlipR-data)
